Auth.registerDescription: Create an account as a student or mentor.
Auth.forgotPasswordDescription: We will send you a password reset link.
Auth.resetPasswordDescription: Choose a new password for your account.
Auth.verifyEmailDescription: We are verifying your email address.
Auth.name: Name
Auth.checkInbox: Check your inbox for a verification link.
Auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for this email, we sent a reset link.
Auth.emailVerified: Email verified. You can log in now.

errors.email_not_verified: Please verify your email before logging in.
errors.account_disabled: This account has been disabled. Contact an administrator.
errors.mentor_not_approved: Your mentor account is pending administrator approval.
errors.email_exists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.token_expired: This link has expired. Please try again.

student.title: Student dashboard
student.description: Your team overview, active tasks, deadlines, and submissions.
student.upcomingDeadlinesDescription: Open tasks sorted by nearest deadline.

mentor.title: Mentor dashboard
mentor.description: Manage tasks and review submissions here.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.description: Manage users, teams, and tasks here.
admin.teamsLinkDescription: View and manage all internship teams.
admin.mentorsLinkDescription: Assign each mentor's main responsible group.
admin.tasksLinkDescription: Create and manage tasks for internship groups.
admin.topicsLinkDescription: Define topics that can be assigned to tasks.
admin.submissionsLinkDescription: Review student submissions, add comments, and manage grades.
admin.clientsLinkDescription: Create client accounts and manage organization details.
admin.usersLinkDescription: Create accounts, manage roles, and control access.

client.title: Client dashboard
client.description: View assigned teams and review student submissions.
client.teamsLinkDescription: Open a team, view members, and leave feedback.
client.submissionsLinkDescription: Review submissions from your assigned teams and leave comments.
client.recentSubmissionsDescription: Latest student work from your assigned teams.
client.recentCommentsDescription: Latest feedback on submissions from your teams.

Team.setupDescription: To participate in the internship, create a new team or join via an invitation.
Team.setupJoinHint: If you have an invitation, open the link from your email or teammate.
Team.createTeamDescription: Fill in your team details and choose your project role.
Team.teamPageDescription: View and edit team details, invite teammates.
Team.teamDetailsReadOnlyNote: Classroom, class, school, and group can only be changed by a mentor or administrator.
Team.socialUrlsHint: Add links to your team's social profiles (optional).
Team.teamSizeWarning: Your team has fewer than 2 members. Add teammates before the internship starts.
Team.joinTeamDescriptionGeneric: Join a team using an invitation.
Team.joinTeamLoginRequired: Log in or register to join {teamName}.
Team.tasksPlaceholderDescription: Team tasks will appear here in a later step.

errors.already_in_team: You are already on a team.
errors.role_not_allowed: This role is not allowed for the team's current size.
errors.duplicate_role: For a 3-member team, each role can only be used once.
errors.email_mismatch: This invitation was sent to a different email address.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.invalid_url: Please enter a valid URL (including https://).

AdminUsers.title: Users
AdminUsers.description: Create accounts manually, manage roles, verify emails, reset passwords, and disable or delete users.
AdminUsers.emptyUsers: No users match the selected filters.
AdminUsers.confirmEmailPrompt: Are you sure you want to manually confirm this user's email?
AdminUsers.verificationDescription: If a user cannot receive or use the verification email, you can manually confirm their account here.
AdminUsers.deleteWarning: Deleting a user permanently removes their account and related profile data.
AdminUsers.cannotChangeOwnRole: You cannot change your own role.
AdminUsers.cannotManageSelfStatus: You cannot disable or delete your own account from here.
AdminUsers.mentorGroupDescription: Assign the mentor's main responsible group for creating and applying tasks.
AdminUsers.clientTeamsDescription: Assign teams this client can access. Only teams without a client can be added here.
AdminUsers.confirmMentorApprovalPrompt: Are you sure you want to approve this mentor? They will be able to log in after email verification.
AdminUsers.mentorApprovalDescription: Mentors must be approved by an administrator before they can log in.

MentorDashboard.title: Mentor dashboard
MentorDashboard.noMainGroupWarning: You do not have a main group assigned yet. Ask an administrator to assign one before creating or applying tasks.
MentorDashboard.mainGroupDescription: You are responsible for {group} ({teams} teams). You can create and apply tasks only for this group.

permissions.viewAll: View all groups, teams, tasks, and submissions
permissions.createTasks: Create and apply tasks only for your main group
permissions.commentAll: Comment on submissions from all groups

cards.teamsDescription: Browse and edit team details across all groups
cards.submissionsDescription: Review student submissions from all groups

dashboard.mainGroupTasksDescription: Tasks assigned to your main group.
dashboard.pendingReviewsDescription: Submitted work without a grade yet.
dashboard.recentSubmissionsDescription: Latest student work across all groups.

MentorDashboard.submissionsReviewNote: Detailed review, comments, and grading will be available in the next step.

ClientTeams.title: Assigned teams
ClientTeams.description: Open a team to view members, review submissions, and leave feedback.
ClientTeams.submissionsHint: Review task submissions from this team and leave comments for the students.

ClientSubmissions.title: Submissions
ClientSubmissions.description: Review student work from your assigned teams and leave comments.
ClientSubmissions.emptySubmissions: No submissions match the selected filters.

SubmissionReviews.listDescription: Review student work, leave comments, and assign grades.
SubmissionReviews.emptySubmissions: No submissions match the selected filters.
SubmissionReviews.draftNote: This submission has not been submitted yet (draft).
SubmissionReviews.commentsDescription: Leave feedback for the team about this submission.
SubmissionReviews.evaluationDescription: Add a comment, assign a grade, or both. Comments can be saved on their own; saving a grade requires a grade and can include an optional comment.
SubmissionReviews.latestGradeNote: Only the latest grade is stored for each submission.
SubmissionReviews.cannotEditOtherGrade: This grade was assigned by another mentor. Only they or an administrator can change it.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.invalid_grade: Grade must be a whole number from 1 to 10.
errors.cannot_edit_other_grade: You can only update grades you assigned.

Submissions.urlsHint: Add one or more links to your work (e.g. GitHub, Figma, Google Docs).
Submissions.pastDeadlineWarning: The deadline has passed. You can still edit your submission, but it will be marked as late.
Submissions.notEligible: This task is not assigned to your role or team.
Submissions.fileUploadComingSoon: File upload support is coming soon.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.invalid_url: One or more URLs are invalid. Make sure each starts with https://.

TeamFeedback.description: Create targeted feedback for this team and track resolution.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.

TeamTasks.empty: There are no tasks for this team.
TeamTasks.noSolution: No solution has been submitted yet.

StudentTasks.submittedDescription: History of tasks your team has submitted solutions for.
StudentTasks.newEmpty: There are no new tasks right now.

Tasks.title: Title
Tasks.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the task. You can use bold text and images.
Tasks.onePerTeamHint: Any one team member can submit a response on behalf of the team.
Tasks.responseTypesHint: Select at least one way students can submit their response.
Tasks.selectGroupsHint: Or select one or more groups:
Tasks.applyToGroupDescription: Create a copy of this task for your main group with a new deadline.
Tasks.reusedTaskNote: This task was applied from another group.
Tasks.alreadyAppliedNote: This task is already assigned to your main group.
Tasks.studentEmptyTasks: No tasks assigned to your team yet.
Tasks.submissionComingSoon: Submissions will be available in the next step.

errors.title_too_short: The title must be at least 2 characters.
errors.title_too_long: The title must be at most 255 characters.

errors.already_in_main_group: This task is already in your main group.
errors.already_applied: This task has already been applied to your main group.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to upload images.
